questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Teacher: I called your mom today, and she said you weren’t home until 10 p.m. So, where were you? Hank: Um... I’m sorry. _______________ Teacher: As long as you’re telling me the truth, it’s OK.
options: My mom thought I was late.
You didn’t call my mom. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文

options: Are you here to protest against animal testing?
What do you say about the animal shelters? ˉ 公告試題

questions.subject: 英文

options: It sounds like a good excuse. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Policeman: Sir, please move your vehicle immediately. Jack: Did I do anything wrong? 僅供參考 Policeman: You parked in the space reserved for the disabled. Jack: _______________ Policeman: Thank you for your cooperation.
options: But, there is no one parking here.
I’m sorry. I will move it right away.
Really? I thought you understand my situation.
I think you need to calm down. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jane: Thank you for stopping by. Can I get you anything? Lisa: _______________ Jane: Coming right up.
options: You have nothing I want from you.
A cup of coffee would be nice.
No, I don’t drink in the daytime.
I don’t know what I have in mind.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Coffee Shop Clerk: What can I get for you? Customer: Mocha, please. Coffee Shop Clerk: ____________ Customer: Half milk and no sugar. Thank you.
options: How would you like to pay for it? ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Lucy: You forgot to clean your room as you promised, Tom. Tom: Oh, no! It totally slipped my mind. Will you do it for me before Mom gets back? Lucy: ____________
options: Out of sight, out of mind!
You are a boy of my dream. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Zoo Keeper: You look like you are having a good time with the kangaroos. Child: Yeah, I do! I notice that they are sensitive when someone is getting close to them. Zoo Keeper: Good observation! _______________ Child: Thank you.
options: You need to feed them more.
You take such good care of them.
You’re going to learn how to take care of them. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Olivia: What’s the biggest source of pollution? The answer might surprise you. Fenny: Plastic bags? Olivia: 公告試題 No, throwaway diapers. Fenny: But how come they became a source of pollution? Olivia: _______________
options: Cotton diapers are good for the environment.

People are using fewer throwaway diapers. ˉ III. 綜合測驗:以下三篇短文,共有 15 個空格,為第 26 至 40 題,每題有四個 僅供參考 選項,請依各篇短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ˉ ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 26 – 30 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格 的答案 。 In my free time, I really like surfing the Internet. When I get home from work, I turn on my computer, wait until it boots up completely, and then go online. With a broadband Internet service, webpages load faster with a high-speed 26, and I can upload and download files faster. I usually check my e-mail first and write a few messages to family and friends. I sometimes 27 the local news headlines at my favorite news website and read up on the 28 local and international news. This website often provides video news clips that I can view online. I sometimes order products online to save money and time 29 going to a store and buying what I am looking for. Whatever I do, I realize that there are problems with using the Internet, including scams, identity theft, and viruses. I am very careful not to 30 my personal information. Using the Internet can be a fun and convenient way of shopping and finding out new information, but I just need to be careful.
